crons_tz: All cron expressions use local timezone (America/Los_Angeles). 0 7 = 7 AM PT = 14:00 UTC.

crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update your heartbeat, check inbox, and work on your highest priority task.

crons.name: rgos-task-poll
crons.prompt: Check for tasks assigned to you in the RGOS kanban: use mcp__rgos__cortex_list_tasks with assigned_to="codex" and status="approved". If any tasks are found, claim each one with mcp__rgos__cortex_claim_task (agent_id="codex"), then work them in priority order. Log a cortextos bus log-event for each claimed task. If no tasks, do nothing.

crons.name: codex-task-poll
crons.prompt: Check inbox for tasks routed from orchestrator or dev. Do not dispatch browser/UI/web automation to Greg's Mac. Use Orgo/Codex-CU VM paths by default; for OB1 e2e/dogfood specifically use Compl1 VM 23e7d600 targeting https://ob1.revopsglobal.com. Only use `cortextos bus computer-use` for non-browser work or when a current explicit Orgo-failure artifact authorizes Mac fallback. Capture the response, validate completeness, reply to the requesting agent, and log a codex_dispatched event with the task summary, prompt length, runtime target, and duration.
